zh.lifeSummary: Richard Freyzell是Walter Freyzell和Unknown的兒子，於大約1290年出生在英國素福爾可維斯特利。他於1310年與Catherine Gedding在英國英格蘭素福爾可丁結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1371年在他的家鄉享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Freyzell是Walter Freyzell和Unknown的儿子，于大约1290年出生在英国素福爾可維斯特利。他于1310年与Catherine Gedding在英国英格兰素福爾可丁结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1371年在他的家乡享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: Richard Freyzell was born about 1290, in Westley, Suffolk, England as the son of Walter Freyzell and Unknown. He married Catherine Gedding in 1310, in Gedding, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died about 1371, in his hometown, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Freyzell est né environ 1290, à Westley, Suffolk, Angleterre, fils de Walter Freyzell et Unknown. Il a épousé Catherine Gedding en 1310, à Gedding, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1371, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Freyzell wurde um 1290 in Westley, Suffolk, England, als Sohn von Walter Freyzell und Unknown geboren. Er hat 1310 in Gedding, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Catherine Gedding geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1371 im Alter von 83 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Freyzell è nato il circa 1290 nel Westley, Suffolk, England come figlio di Walter Freyzell e Unknown. Lui sposato Catherine Gedding nel 1310, nel Gedding, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1371, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Freyzellは約1290年にイギリススフォルクウエストリーでWalter FreyzellとUnknownの息子として生まれた。1310年にイギリスイギリススフォルクジェッドイングでCatherine Geddingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1371年に故郷で83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Freyzell(은)는 대략 1290년 영국 수폴크 웨스틀리에서 Walter Freyzell(와)과 Unknown의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1310년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 게딩에서 Catherine Gedding(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1371년 그의 고향에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Freyzell nasceu aproximadamente 1290, em Westley, Suffolk, Inglaterra filho de Walter Freyzell e Unknown. Ele casou-se com Catherine Gedding em 1310, em Gedding, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1371, em sua cidade natal, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Freyzell родился около 1290 г. в местности вестли, суффолк, Англия. Его родителей звали Walter Freyzell и Unknown. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Gedding в 1310 г. в местности джеддинг, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1371 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Freyzell nació aproximadamente 1290, en Westley, Suffolk, Inglaterra como hijo de Walter Freyzell y Unknown.
